page: Vultr vcg-a16-96c-878g-256vram is a Dedicated Metal GPU server configured with an AMD x86_64 processor. The system features 96 physical cores and 96 vCPUs, operating with a single thread per core. It is equipped with 877.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 9.14 GB of RAM per core.

The server includes a bundled GPU accelerator configuration consisting of 16 NVIDIA Ampere A16 GPUs, delivering a combined total of 256 GB of VRAM. Local storage is provided by a 3072 GB NVMe SSD. The network configuration includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.

This hardware profile offers high resource density, combining massive GPU memory capacity with substantial system RAM and physical core counts on a dedicated metal platform. The server is designed for workloads requiring parallel graphics processing, high-density virtual desktop infrastructure, video streaming, and GPU-accelerated computational tasks.
description: Vultr vcg-a16-96c-878g-256vram is a Dedicated Metal GPU server designed for highly parallelized workloads. It features an AMD x86_64 processor with 96 physical cores and 96 vCPUs, paired with 877.0 GB of system memory. The server is equipped with 16 NVIDIA Ampere A16 GPUs, providing a total of 256 GB of VRAM. Storage is supported by a 3072 GB NVMe SSD, and the network configuration includes one complimentary public IPv4 address. This high-density hardware profile is optimized for GPU-accelerated tasks, virtual desktop infrastructure, and parallel computing workloads requiring extensive graphics memory and physical core counts.

tagline: A high-density dedicated server featuring ninety-six physical AMD cores, three terabytes of NVMe storage, and sixteen NVIDIA Ampere GPUs.
